visualDebt.issue: Typography lacks contrast making text hard to read against background colors.
visualDebt.recommendation: Increase text contrast by using darker fonts on lighter backgrounds or vice versa.

visualDebt.issue: Navigation menu is cluttered and hard to find on mobile devices.
visualDebt.recommendation: Optimize the mobile navigation by using a collapsible menu and ensuring items are clearly labeled.

visualDebt.issue: Value proposition is not immediately clear on the homepage.
visualDebt.recommendation: Highlight the unique selling points prominently above the fold on the homepage.

visualDebt.issue: Website is not fully responsive on smaller screens.
visualDebt.recommendation: Implement responsive design techniques to ensure all elements reformat correctly on mobile devices.

visualDebt.issue: Lacks consistent branding across different pages of the website.
visualDebt.recommendation: Ensure consistent use of colors, fonts, and logo placement throughout the site.

summary: Midnight Coffee Roasting's website has a visually appealing design with a warm aesthetic but faces challenges in clarity and technical execution. Improving navigation clarity and strengthening responsive design will enhance user experience and trust.
weaknesses: Lack of clear value proposition on homepage.
